data.name: Prathamesh Palatshaha

experience.description: Built automated fault detection system for Air Handling Units achieving 99.71% accuracy and 99.34% ROC-AUC by implementing Bagging Classifier with BorderlineSMOTE on LBNL’s MZVAV-1 dataset from AFDD Evaluation Inventory using Python, Scikit-Learn, and imbalanced-learn. Optimized model performance achieving 99.94% precision and 99.92% recall (F1-score: 99.91%) through systematic evaluation of 8+ ensemble-sampling combinations, outperforming baseline Random Forest models by 16% in accuracy. Resolved 6:1 class imbalance affecting 14+ operational features by applying stratified K-fold splitting, robust scaling for 4 skewed columns (Supply Air Temp, OA Temp, RA Temp, Cooling Coil Signal), and min-max normalization using Pandas and NumPy. Engineered predictive maintenance framework processing minute-by-minute sensor data from multi-zone VAV systems (supply/return fans, cooling/heating coils, dampers) to enable early fault detection and minimize system downtime.

projects.name: ChatBOT - RAG Based QNA Bot
projects.description: Built a PDF-based Question Answering system using RAG for querying document content. Enabled multi-modal extraction (text, tables, images) with vector-based semantic retrieval. Generated context-aware answers using an LLM (Gemini) grounded in PDF data.

projects.name: Banking Data Analysis
projects.description: Performed comprehensive analysis on banking data to extract key insights and trends. Cleaned, processed, and visualized datasets using Python (pandas, matplotlib). Created interactive dashboards and statistical summaries to support business decision-making.

education.institution: Dr B R Ambedkar National Institute of Technology, Jalandhar

data.domain: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science
